theme_and_colors.description: High contrast, functional clarity with a focus on data legibility. Monochrome structural foundation with vibrant Toyota Red as the primary action and alert color.

rules: DO NOT use Inter, Roboto, Open Sans, or Lato for headings.
Overlines / Labels MUST be Uppercase, text-xs, tracking-[0.2em].
Line Height: leading-none for headers, leading-relaxed for body.
Primary Data (Charts/Tables): col-span-2 row-span-2 or col-span-3.
Every pixel must be utilized. Use h-full on children to ensure they stretch to match their neighbors.

surfaces.dashboard_cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-border), no shadow. Max 8px border-radius (rounded-md). Hover: Slight lift (-translate-y-1), subtle shadow.
surfaces.headers: Solid Background with a hard bottom border for admin layouts.

components.strategy: Shadcn/UI heavily customized for a flat, technical, rectangular look.
components.forms: Use Shadcn Input, Select, Checkbox. Never native elements.
components.tables: Dense, crisp borders. Use border-collapse with subtle border-b on rows. Left-align most columns, right-align numeric data.
components.charts: Use Recharts (via Shadcn Chart components). Ensure tooltips are clear and match the high-contrast theme.
components.buttons: Sharp or slightly rounded (rounded-md). Strong contrast on hover (e.g. hover:brightness-90).

visual_enhancers.icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for dense data environments.
visual_enhancers.textures: Minimal. Focus on optical clarity and 1px borders.
visual_enhancers.animations: Minimalist micro-interactions. Hover states, subtle entrance staggered animations for lists/tables.

login_background.description: Large modern warehouse filled with shelves. Use as a half-screen background on the login page with a dark or red overlay.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL DEPENDENCIES: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react recharts sonner framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge lucide-react
Apply Outfit font for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body in index.html.
Update tailwind.config.js to use the HSL variables specified in the design_guidelines theme section.
Set the CSS variables in index.css to match the light/dark mode colors provided.
Implement a robust multi-role layout: Sidebar for navigation (Dashboard, Inventory, Orders, Settings) with active state indicators.
Use Shadcn UI components for Tabs, Tables, Select, and Dialogs. Ensure they are completely functional and styled accurately.
For the MIP calculation logic, create clear visual indicators (badges) for 'Perlu Order', 'Over Stok', and 'Stop Order'.
Add test IDs (`data-testid`) to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, table rows).
Use 'sonner' for toast notifications (e.g., File upload success, MIP calculated).
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and 1px inner borders.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Always add transitions for specific interactive elements (e.g. transition-colors, transition-transform).
You MUST NOT center align the app container. Do not add '.App { text-align: center; }'.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 for icons. Use the specified icon library (Phosphor Icons).
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, and entrance animations.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations separate good from extraordinary.
DO NOT use complete `transparent` background in headers, overlays, or any surface that has content under it. Example: Dropdown with transparent background is forbidden.
